                                <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-language">
                                    <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-nolan" style="display: none;">暂无字幕</div>
                                    <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-major" style="width: 100%;">
                                        <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-major-title" style="display: none;">主字幕</div>
                                        <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-major-content" style="height: 40px;">
                                            <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-major-inner"><div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-language-item" data-lan="ai-zh">
                    <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-language-item-text">中文</div> <span class="bpx-common-svg-icon"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" data-pointer="none" viewBox="0 0 14 12"><rect width="13.5" height="11.5" x=".25" y=".25" stroke="#fff" stroke-opacity=".5" stroke-width=".5" rx="5.75"></rect><path fill="#fff" d="M5.248 2.788h.76L8.256 8.5h-.712l-.608-1.6H4.312l-.608 1.6H3l2.248-5.712Zm-.728 3.56h2.208l-1.08-2.856h-.032L4.52 6.348Zm4.362-3.56h.648V8.5h-.648V2.788Z"></path></svg></span>
                </div></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-minor" style="display: none;">
                                        <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-minor-title">副字幕</div>
                                        <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-minor-content">
                                            <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-minor-inner"></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-separator-bottom"></div>
                                <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-bilingual-bottom" style="display: none;">字幕</div>
                                <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-setting">
                                    <span class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-setting-text">字幕设置</span>
                                    <span class="bpx-common-svg-icon"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xml:space="preserve" data-pointer="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="m9.188 7.999-3.359 3.359a.75.75 0 1 0 1.061 1.061l3.889-3.889a.75.75 0 0 0 0-1.061L6.89 3.58a.75.75 0 1 0-1.061 1.061l3.359 3.358z"></path></svg></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>    
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-menu-description" style="display: none;">
                            <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-description-title">
                                <span class="bpx-common-svg-icon"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-pointer="none" viewBox="0 0 6 10"><path fill="#fff" d="M4.93.15c.231-.213.613-.197.865.035l.038.034a.556.556 0 0 1 0 .795L1.538 5l4.295 4.017a.557.557 0 0 1 0 .796l-.053.047c-.26.19-.63.19-.851-.014L.167 5.396a.557.557 0 0 1 0-.795L4.93.15Z"></path></svg></span>
                                <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-description-title-text"></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-description-separator"></div>
                            <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-description-content">
                <p>B站自研的AI原声翻译功能通过大模型翻译、音色克隆、中文字幕改写、口型匹配等AI能力，将中文原生视频转化为"外语原生视频"：</p>
                <ul>
                    <li>• 将中文内容翻译为外语</li>
                    <li>• 保留原视频内说话人的音色、语调和话语节奏</li>
                    <li>• 在可能的情况下，会同步将原视频内的中文字幕擦除并匹配对应外语字幕、将讲中文的嘴型匹配为外语嘴型</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div></div>
        
        <div class="bui-panel-item" style="width: 266px; height: 260px;"><div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-menu-right">
                            <div class="bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-item bpx-player-ctrl-subtitle-item-flex">

data-v-632962f9="" style="height: 84px;"><span class="desc-info-text" data-v-632962f9="">传智教育·黑马程序员Java研究院全新录制的Java入门教程
全部配套资源领取方式：关注黑马程序员公众号，回复关键词:领取资源02
===============================
课程分为四大篇章，涵盖了Redis的各种数据结构和命令，Redis的各种常见Java客户端的应用和最佳实践。还有Redis在企业中的应用方案，例如共享session、缓存及缓存更新策略、分布式锁、消息队列、秒杀等场景。另外还有Redis的主从、哨兵、集群等的搭建和原理，使用运维过程中的最佳实践方案。最后还会深入学习Redis底层原理、网络模型、通信模型、内存淘汰策略等内容</span></div>
